databricks.label: Databricks focus
databricks.plan_line: Databricks (Genie) for warehouse metrics over Unity Catalog tables — read-only NL/SQL queries.
databricks.base_notes: Query Unity Catalog tables via the Databricks managed Genie MCP server — ask analytical questions in natural language; Genie generates and runs read-only SQL and returns the results plus the SQL. Read-only by design (Genie has no write path). Prefer this over the Databricks SQL MCP server, which is read+write and guarded only by Unity Catalog grants. Queries run under your UC identity, so UC permissions and lineage apply.
